creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
As subject. Not receiving any emails from freebsd lists to my mailbox since about 1400 UTC yesterday (29th October). As I'm subscribed to over 50 lists@freebsd i'd expect to receive at least 20 or 30/day.

An email I posted to arch@ on Fri, 29 Oct 2021 16:13:33 +0100 has still not appeared on https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-arch/2021-October/date.html as of 30th October 0126 +0100 and I've not seen any bounce.

I have no issues receiving emails to the same address from other mailing lists eg misc@openbsd.org and no issues sending email
